by_regime.empty_reason: no_closed_lab_trades: missing closed_lab_trades with signal.metadata_json.regime.regime_key; paper_trades.csv has no matching closed trades.

by_entry_variant.empty_reason: no_closed_lab_trades: missing closed_lab_trades with signal.metadata_json.entry_variant_id; paper_trades.csv has no matching closed trades.
